title: Beautifully Infected
description: This mod is based around Terrain and the Spore Fungal Infection mods.
body:
**Enhanced** vanilla biomes with seemless transitions. 
An **infection** that is slowly **devouring** the world. 
**_Just something simple for an average player looking for a twist._**



Note
This Modpack uses a **_IN-DEVELOPEMENT_** Bliss Shaders version that works with Distant Horizons. This Shader can be found at https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader
